notes: Baseline persona picker looks correct but is non-functional at runtime — personaType is silently dropped without the ...rest spread fix in webai.js

Key discriminator: the ...rest spread fix in webai.js. Without it, personaType reaches the streamCompletion call but is silently discarded before host.request() — the picker looks functional but does nothing at runtime. Skill also enforces a separate persona.js module with requestPersonaAccess for Apogee's permission system.
